assertions.assertion: Explains that SLO uses front-channel logout via iframes (not redirect chains)
assertions.rationale: Does not mention iframes or front-channel. Describes a generic redirect-based flow.

assertions.assertion: Shows SingleLogoutServiceUrls configuration with SamlEndpointType and SamlBinding.HttpRedirect
assertions.rationale: Uses 'SingleLogoutService' (singular) with generic Endpoint type and string binding URI, not the correct types.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that partial logout is normal/expected when some SPs don't respond
assertions.rationale: Mentions SLO can be 'unreliable' but doesn't frame partial logout as expected/normal behavior.
